originalTitle: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
summary: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public Instagram account could be used in AI creations without the account owner's permission. […]
content: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public Instagram account could be used in AI creations without the account owner’s permission. “Earlier this week, we announced that one way for people to generate images in Meta AI is by @-mentioning public Instagram accounts that they want to reference,” Meta says in an update to a blog post about its new Muse Image AI model. “Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way. We’ve heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it’s no longer available.” Meta did let you opt out by digging through settings before turning off the feature entirely, but the feature still drew major criticism. “Not only does this obviously erode our rights to our own likeness… but it is an obvious tool for #sextortion and other scammers!” Haley McNamara, executive director and chief strategy officer of the National Center on Sexual Exploitation, said earlier on Friday. “Pursuing high-risk design & then putting the onus on individuals to jump through hoops to opt out is unacceptable.” The Screen Actors Guild recommended that its members opt out of the feature and spelled out instructions on how to do so.
chineseTitle: Meta 关闭了 Instagram 功能，该功能允许用户对公共帐户进行 AI 深度伪造
chineseSummary: 在遭到强烈反对后，Meta 将关闭其本周宣布的一项功能，该功能允许用户仅通过标记公共 Instagram 帐户的内容即可根据这些内容生成人工智能图像。该功能最初设置意味着任何公共 Instagram 帐户的内容都可以在未经帐户所有者许可的情况下用于人工智能创作。 […]
chineseContent: 在遭到强烈反对后，Meta 将关闭其本周宣布的一项功能，该功能允许用户仅通过标记公共 Instagram 帐户的内容即可根据这些内容生成人工智能图像。该功能最初设置意味着任何公共 Instagram 帐户的内容都可以在未经帐户所有者许可的情况下用于人工智能创作。 “本周早些时候，我们宣布人们在 Meta AI 中生成图像的一种方法是@提及他们想要引用的公共 Instagram 帐户，”Meta 在一篇有关其新 Muse Image AI 模型的博客文章更新中表示。 “我们的目的是提供一个有用的创意工具，让人们控制是否可以通过这种方式引用他们的公共内容。我们听到的反馈是，此功能没有达到目标，因此不再可用。” Meta 确实允许你在完全关闭该功能之前通过深入研究设置来选择退出，但该功能仍然引起了重大批评。 “这不仅明显侵蚀了我们对自己肖像的权利......而且它显然是#sextortion 和其他诈骗者的工具！”国家性剥削中心执行董事兼首席战略官海莉·麦克纳马拉周五早些时候表示。 “追求高风险设计，然后让个人有责任跳过障碍选择退出，这是不可接受的。”美国演员工会建议其成员选择退出该功能，并详细说明了如何这样做。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
